has-agent-dispatcher.rollback_command: systemctl enable has-agent-dispatcher && systemctl start has-agent-dispatcher

hasf-product-factory.rollback_command: systemctl enable hasf-product-factory && systemctl start hasf-product-factory

helm-runner.rollback_command: systemctl enable helm-runner && systemctl start helm-runner

hoch-ag-execution-daemon.rollback_command: systemctl enable hoch-ag-execution-daemon && systemctl start hoch-ag-execution-daemon

hoch-relay-telemetry.rollback_command: systemctl enable hoch-relay-telemetry && systemctl start hoch-relay-telemetry

rollback_commands: systemctl enable has-agent-dispatcher hasf-product-factory helm-runner hoch-ag-execution-daemon hoch-relay-telemetry
systemctl start has-agent-dispatcher hasf-product-factory helm-runner hoch-ag-execution-daemon hoch-relay-telemetry
